name: sas-presentation
description: Create polished SAS-AM branded Reveal.js presentations with light/dark mode, narrative structure, and professional layouts. Adds a fixed 16:9 scaled stage, density modes, an animation library, zero-dependency export, compression-safe typography for screen share, a shipped SAS logo, a subtle navigation rail, headless-Chromium PDF export, and a sas-am.com/resources showcase. Implements SAS brand guidelines with discovery-driven content creation workflow.
